items.definition_en: Sirloin is a tender cut of beef from the back of the animal.
items.example_en: He ordered a grilled sirloin for dinner.

items.definition_en: Tenderloin is a very soft and lean cut of meat often used for steaks.
items.example_en: The chef recommended the pork tenderloin tonight.

items.definition_en: Brisket is a flavorful, tough cut of beef best cooked slowly.
items.example_en: The smoked brisket was delicious and juicy.

items.definition_en: Prosciutto is a thinly sliced, dry-cured Italian ham.
items.example_en: She wrapped the melon slices in prosciutto.

items.definition_en: A pork chop is a thick slice of pork usually including a bone.
items.example_en: He fried a pork chop for lunch.

items.definition_en: Ribeye is a juicy cut of beef steak with marbled fat.
items.example_en: The ribeye steak was cooked medium rare.

items.definition_en: A drumette is the meaty part of a chicken wing.
items.example_en: She served spicy chicken drumettes at the party.

items.definition_en: Bratwurst is a type of German sausage made from pork or beef.
items.example_en: We grilled bratwurst for the barbecue.

items.definition_en: A cutlet is a slice of meat coated and fried or baked.
items.example_en: He made a chicken cutlet for dinner.

items.definition_en: A tender is a small, breaded strip of chicken meat.
items.example_en: She ordered chicken tenders with fries.

items.definition_en: Dripping is fat collected from roasted meat.
items.example_en: Dripping can be spread on bread for flavor.

items.definition_en: Corned beef is salt-cured beef often served sliced or canned.
items.example_en: She made a sandwich with corned beef.

items.definition_en: Giblets are the edible organs of poultry such as heart and liver.
items.example_en: The gravy contains chicken giblets for extra flavor.

items.definition_en: A thigh is the upper part of a chicken leg.
items.example_en: She baked chicken thighs for dinner.

items.definition_en: Prosciutto cotto is an Italian cooked ham, milder than cured ham.
items.example_en: We added slices of prosciutto cotto to the sandwich.

items.definition_en: A brat is a short form for bratwurst, a grilled German sausage.
items.example_en: He served a grilled brat with mustard.

items.definition_en: A wingette is the middle, flat section of a chicken wing.
items.example_en: The platter had plenty of spicy wingettes.

items.definition_en: Pastrami is beef that has been brined, seasoned, and smoked.
items.example_en: He loves pastrami sandwiches on rye bread.

items.definition_en: Duck breast is the tender meat from the chest of a duck.
items.example_en: We enjoyed roasted duck breast at the restaurant.

items.definition_en: A Cornish hen is a small, young chicken often served whole.
items.example_en: She roasted a Cornish hen with herbs.
